extension.description: Download and install add-ons from the official repository for add-ons of Doemela.[CR] Install this repository to receive automatic updates for:[CR][CR] • Clock Overlay, A lightweight Python-based clock that displays a temporary overlay during media playback.[CR] • WireGuard Manager NordVPN, High-performance VPN manager for LibreELEC. Uses NordLynx for maximum speed with an automated Systemd watchdog to prevent connection drops.[CR][CR]All add-ons on this repository have under gone basic testing, if you find a broken or not working add-on please report it so we can take any action needed.
extension.news: v2.1.3 - Added: service.wireguard.manager-dev version 1.0.0.101 BETA/DEV VERSION for testers.

extension.description: A lightweight Python-based clock that displays a temporary overlay during media playback.[CR] [B][COLOR yellow]Features:[/COLOR][/B] • [B]Shortcut:[/B] Press [I]0[/I] during playback. • [B]Customizable:[/B] Change duration and opacity in settings.
extension.news:
v1.7.8 - resize of screenshot00000
v1.7.7 - Cleaned up files and new icons

extension.summary: Hardened NordVPN WireGuard Manager for Raspberry Pi 5
extension.description: High-performance VPN manager for LibreELEC. Uses NordLynx for maximum speed with an automated Systemd watchdog to prevent connection drops.[CR][CR][B]Note:[/B] This addon is designed specifically for the LibreELEC filesystem and will not work on standard Android or Windows Kodi installations.[CR][CR][B]Features:[/B][CR]• WireGuard Native (NordLynx)[CR]• Smart Watchdog & Auto-Regen[CR]• Hard Reset Routing Tables[CR][CR][B]Disclaimer:[/B] Not an official NordVPN product. Use at your own risk. This addon is provided "as is" without warranty. The developer is not liable for data loss or security breaches. Full disclaimer available in addon settings.
extension.news:
v1.3.1 (2026-04-29) - Improved compatibility with Kodi addon submission guidelines - Fixed non-whitelisted file warnings by using .sample extensions - Optimized internal setup helper for resource deployment
v1.3.0 (2026-04-29) - Major Architecture Update: Replaced legacy Bash scripts with pure Python 3 logic. - Improved Reliability: Server regeneration no longer depends on external shell environments. - Optimized Paths: Fixed "File Not Found" errors by using modern xbmcvfs translation. - UI Enhancements: Smoother progress transitions and snappier menu response. - Maintenance: Fixed .addonignore issues to ensure core scripts are always installed.
v1.2.9 (2026-04-29) - Fixed critical "Missing Script" error: update_servers.sh is now correctly included in the addon package. - Updated .addonignore to prevent core assets from being stripped during installation. - Enhanced vpn_core.py with absolute path translation using modern xbmcvfs standards. - Improved server regeneration reliability for Kodi 21.3 Omega.

extension.description: [B][COLOR yellow]BETA/DEV VERSION[/COLOR][/B][CR]High-performance, hardened VPN manager for LibreELEC. Now supports multiple providers including NordVPN (NordLynx), Private Internet Access (PIA), and Custom manual configurations. Features an automated Systemd watchdog to prevent connection drops and secure DNS hardening.[CR][CR][B]Note:[/B] Designed specifically for LibreELEC. [CR][CR][B]Features:[/B][CR]• Multi-Provider Support (Nord, PIA, Custom)[CR]• Pure Python WireGuard Handshake logic[CR]• Smart Watchdog & Auto-Reconnect[CR]• Hardened DNS & IPv6 Leak Protection[CR][CR][B]Disclaimer:[/B] Not an official product of any VPN provider. Use at your own risk.
extension.news: v1.0.0.101 - Major Feature: Multi-Provider Architecture (NordVPN, PIA, Custom). - New Module: Private Internet Access (PIA) with dynamic WireGuard handshake. - New Module: Custom Provider support for manual .config file imports. - Fine tuned Raspberry Pi 5 with high-speed network timings. - Added hardware detection for separate Pi 4 and Pi 5 configurations. - Fixed VPN reconnect loops by optimizing WATCHDOG_SETTLE_DELAY. - Implemented "Silent Reconnect" for background VPN switching during streams. - Added blackout "Grace Period" to prevent false network alerts. - Smart Country Selector: Replaced manual ID entry with a live API-driven multi-select dialog. - Core: Standardized temporary state files to /tmp for improved reliability. - Fix: Enhanced Auto-Mapper to correctly distinguish between manual and automated sessions. - Fix: Space-safe Service ID (SID) detection for complex VPN server names.
